description_long: A generously sized hamburger sits on a round white plate, accompanied by a serving of golden French fries and a few pieces of saucy chicken wings. The hamburger features a lightly toasted sesame seed bun, with visible layers of crisp lettuce, melted cheese, and a thick patty, all held together by a wooden skewer. The cheese is slightly melted and drapes over the patty, while the lettuce and other toppings peek out from the sides. The fries are arranged in a small pile, and the chicken wings are coated in a reddish sauce, adding color contrast to the plate. The plate itself is simple and white, providing a clean backdrop for the food. The overall presentation is appetizing and typical of a casual dining or street food setting.
description: A large hamburger with a sesame seed bun, lettuce, cheese, and a thick patty is served on a white plate with fries and saucy chicken wings.
description_view_0: The hamburger is shown with fries on the left side and the bun's sesame seeds clearly visible on top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the melted cheese and patty, with chicken wings and shredded lettuce visible on the right.
description_view_2: The back of the hamburger is visible, with chicken wings and fries on either side and the lettuce spilling out.
description_view_3: The hamburger is seen with fries on the right and chicken wings on the left, with the bun and toppings clearly layered.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce and cheese are layered beneath the top bun, with cheese partially melted over the patty and lettuce spilling out from the sides. The toppings are distributed unevenly, creating a visually appealing, stacked appearance.
